creator: lehmann@ans-netz.de
text:
Hi,

I finally wanted to take care about this PR, but oidentd compiles on my
(yesterday cvsuped) 8-CURRENT without any changes.
Could you please verify if the problem you wanted to fix with this PR
still applies to you?

   Greetings, Oliver
